name: nexus-rag-oracle
description: Chatbot corporativo com RAG local (Ollama + Chroma)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c green,blue "bun run --filter nexus-rag-oracle-client dev" "bun run --filter nexus-rag-oracle-server dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter nexus-rag-oracle-client build && bun run --filter nexus-rag-oracle-server build
